title: cruciata valentinae
intro: Cruciata valentinae, also known as valerian of the cross or valeriana, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Gentianaceae. The medicinal properties of Cruciata valentinae are attributed to its essential oils, which contain valerenic acid and valeranone, known for their sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from insomnia, anxiety, restlessness, and muscle spasms, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Cruciata valentinae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs like lavender or chamomile to enhance its calming effects.
